articles.title: BREAKING: FTX Gets Court Permission to Sell Crypto Assets
articles.description: According to breaking information, bankrupt cryptocurrency exchange FTX has received the necessary permission to sell its cryptocurrency assets. With the news, there was a sudden decrease of 0.59% in the Bitcoin price and approximately 2% in Solana, which is said to be most affected by liquidations.
